title: Google Tasks (G Suite) Integration
excerpt:
I am requesting a native integration with Google Tasks and Monday.com. 
Problem: Monday.com is not reliable on all devices, platforms, etc. Our users are always at a loss for what to do next. Task systems in other proble…

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am requesting a native integration with Google Tasks and Monday.com.

Problem: Monday.com is not reliable on all devices, platforms, etc. Our users are always at a loss for what to do next. Task systems in other problems have native syncing with Google Tasks, but not Monday.com. Monday.com is continuously evolving and will one day truly become the hub of the software we use. A Zapier connection is possible but requires setup, training, and room for technical errors.

Solution: Provide a native Google Tasks and Monday.com integration to serve as the hub to see what is due in other programs and Monday.com easily. I view this as a temporary fix as Monday builds solutions for users to forgo other applications (i.e., our CRM). We could argue this functionality as a long term solution with Google Tasks easy-to-understand functionality.

We operate on G Suite. Our team loves the reliability, simplicity, and accessibility of Google Tasks. It’s integration with Google Calendar, and our CRM is great. Google Tasks does not have advanced features nor collaboration. We use Monday.com for all projects that do not require our CRM.

We see a significant benefit if Tasks assigned in Monday.com are visible in Google Tasks and vice-a-versa.

posts.author: royha (roy)
posts.cookedHtml: I think this would be a great addition to the product, having a 2 way sync would great improve agility , mostly when working on private boards.

posts.author: shai (Shai Climer)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it is a basic requirement for so many people!!

posts.author: opsbyoz (Elizabeth Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for taking the time to state this request so clearly. I wholeheartedly agree with every word.

posts.author: NeilS (Neil)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is now 3 years later … I have seen this request across a few threads and wondering what is happening.

Not only would we use this feature internally within our organisation, I am busy with a Business Automation process for a client that would love to integrate this feature.

Any updates from Monday.com?

posts.author: jallen (Jen Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Man if I had a dollar for every time I googled to see if this functionality is available

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Keeping this one alive. If we can already integrate our gmail and google calendars, how much harder could it be to allow for tasks integration?

Please prioritize this, @monday

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ Mike abiciea

I can see how a native Google Tasks and Monday.com integration would streamline task management across platforms. Since a direct native integration isn’t available yet, we can bridge the gap with a no-code automation using Make.com or a custom API setup. This would ensure seamless two-way syncing between Google Tasks and Monday.com without the manual hassle of Zapier.

Sync tasks in real-time between Google Tasks & Monday.com
Ensure task updates reflect instantly across both platforms
Enable due dates, priorities, and statuses to stay in sync

Let’s Schedule the call

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: May 2025 and we still waiting for this feature!

posts.author: Joe_Downey (Joe Downey)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s the lack of any kind of response from Monday ( and most companies do this too ) when they have no desire to implement a feature. Being transparent with your clients includes all your intentions, even ones you aren’t planning, not just the ones you can market.

posts.author: huysgt (HarryNg)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Joe_Downey

We’ve just launched an app that solves this pain, offering free access if you’d like to try it.

Try it out here:

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: It is truly disappointing that Monday refuses to take responsibility for this request to integrate Google Tasks natively—without relying on Make or any other third-party software. Monday should act with transparency and professional ethics in addressing this request. This feature is not particularly complex, especially considering that many other, far more advanced integrations have already been implemented. Yet, as of August 2025, it still has not been delivered.
